prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 374 名、380 名、479 名、395 名、300 名，整体呈波动走势。2023 年位次明显后移至 479 名，2024 年回升至 395 名，2025 年大幅前移至 300 名，近两年累计前移约 179 名，2025 年基准约 300 名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 30 人、2022 年 30 人、2023 年 39 人、2024 年 31 人、2025 年 29 人；2026 年计划 23 人，较 2025 年缩招约 20.7%，缩招幅度较大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年主榜第 11 名，近年排名持续上升（2021 年第 15 → 2026 年第 11），属全国顶尖理工类院校；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 56 位（较热），综合热度约 55.5 万，关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见北航断档信号；拥有航空宇航科学与技术、仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程等 7 个 A+ 学科，A- 及以上共 16 个，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心专业大类在 2024–2026 年均为高热推荐或推荐状态，社会热度持续偏高；广西 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 39.2 万人，较 2025 年（物理类+历史类约 38.0 万人）增加约 1.2 万人，竞争略有加剧；2026 年；北航位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在广西无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 300 名、2026 年缩招约 20.7%（竞争加剧使位次前移）、声誉负面事件（可能抑制部分报考意愿使位次后移）、考生总数增加（竞争加剧使位次前移）等多因素，缩招效应与声誉负面效应方向相反，缩招幅度较大但北航顶尖层次吸引力强。预测最低位次约283名，区间233–333名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 374, 380, 479, 395, and 300, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 479, rebounded to 395 in 2024, and sharply moved forward to 300 in 2025, with a cumulative forward movement of about 179 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 300. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi for Science/Physics Category: 30 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 29 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 23, a reduction of about 20.7% compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous rise in recent years (from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering institutions in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly due to the Yang Yun incident involving moral misconduct and academic fraud, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 555,000, indicating moderate to high attention. No historical admission anomalies (e.g., gaps) have been recorded for Beihang. It has 7 A+ disciplines: Aerospace Science and Technology, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, with a total of 16 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, have been highly recommended or recommended from 2024 to 2026, with sustained high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi general college entrance examination is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025 (Physics + History categories about 380,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, a national top-tier university, with no special regional preference in Guangxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 300, a 20.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition pushing rankings forward), negative reputation events (potentially suppressing some application willingness, pushing rankings backward), and an increase in total candidates (intensified competition pushing rankings forward), the reduction effect and reputation effect are opposite. Despite the significant reduction, Beihang's top-tier status remains highly attractive. The predicted minimum ranking is about 283, with a range of 233–333.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (233–333), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 230), you can aim for Tier 1 majors like Future Aerospace Leading Program and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., above 330), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety.
